raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"Helping with the section centrally includes checking whether the architectural choices, results, ablation, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about WER results and ablation effects, so alignment between claims and reported evidence is a central responsibility.","R1.5":"Because the delegation targets an entire section, subsection-level narrative order and presentation arc are centrally implicated.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a draft section most strongly entails sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, register, conciseness, and flow.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty where the delegation and artifact do not specify the intended kind of help in detail.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid assigning stronger responsibilities than the vague delegation supports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility projection and not perform editing, critique, or rewriting of the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection must avoid encouraging unsupported scientific claims or misleading research communication downstream.","RX.5":"The projection should trace each active responsibility to concrete features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: Helping with the section centrally includes checking whether the architectural choices, results, ablation, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about WER results and ablation effects, so alignment between claims and reported evidence is a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: Because the delegation targets an entire section, subsection-level narrative order and presentation arc are centrally implicated.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a draft section most strongly entails sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, register, conciseness, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty where the delegation and artifact do not specify the intended kind of help in detail.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid assigning stronger responsibilities than the vague delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility projection and not perform editing, critique, or rewriting of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection must avoid encouraging unsupported scientific claims or misleading research communication downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should trace each active responsibility to concrete features of the delegation and artifact.
